description: OPTIONAL one-time setup: provisions the 'SecurityInsight' Entra Custom Security Attribute schema (AssetTagName / AssetTier / AssetTagType) and optionally grants the pipeline identity the Attribute Assignment Administrator role. Idempotent -- safe to re-run. Must be run by an Entra admin with 'Attribute Definition Administrator' + 'Privileged Role Administrator' roles; a plain app-only SPN is not sufficient.
author: Morten Knudsen <mok@mortenknudsen.net>
notes: Run ONCE per tenant. Customer values (PipelinePrincipalId, TestObjectId, TenantId) are set in LauncherConfig.ps1 (.gitignore'd). Preferred execution path is the VM / interactive flavour run by an admin user -- the Azure serverless flavours only work if the MI/SPN has been granted the elevated Entra roles above (uncommon).
